19		// controllerProcessedAnnotation is the annotation added to istiocsr resource once after

27		// finalizer name for istiocsr.openshift.operator.io resource.

30		// defaultRequeueTime is the default reconcile requeue time.

33		// istiocsrObjectName is the name of the istio-csr resource created by user.

35		istiocsrObjectName = "default"
36	
37		// istiocsrContainerName is the name of the container created for istiocsr.

39	
40		// istiocsrImageNameEnvVarName is the environment variable key name

43	
44		// istiocsrImageVersionEnvVarName is the environment variable key name

47	
48		// defaultClusterID is the default Kubernetes cluster identifier used by istio-csr
49		// when no custom cluster ID is configured.

51	
52		// defaultIstioRevision is the Istio default revision name. When this revision is

55		defaultIstioRevision = "default"
56	
57		// istiocsrGRPCEndpointFmt is the format string for the istiocsr GRPC service endpoint.

59	
60		// istiodCertificateCommonNameFmt is the format string for deriving the istiod certificate common name

63	
64		// istiodCertificateRevisionBasedDNSName is the format string for deriving the istiod certificate DNS name

67

70	
71		// istiocsrNamespaceMappingLabelName is the label name for identifying the cluster resources or resources

74	
75		// IstiocsrResourceWatchLabelName is the label name for identifying the resources of interest for the

78

81		istiocsrResourceWatchLabelValueFmt = "%s_%s"
